description_long: This is a rectangular, red-brick apartment building with two main stories and a flat, light-colored roof featuring various rooftop structures. The facade is lined with evenly spaced white-framed windows, and the building is set back from the street with a green lawn and a central walkway leading to the main entrance. On one side, there is a row of parked cars adjacent to a line of blooming purple and pink trees, suggesting a residential parking lot. The rear of the building features a small fenced area and a garage, while the opposite side is bordered by wide, multi-lane roads. The overall design is symmetrical and functional, with a focus on accessibility and urban integration. The building's exterior is accented by clean lines and a modest, traditional architectural style.
description: A red-brick, two-story apartment building with a flat roof, white-framed windows, and a central entrance, surrounded by green lawns, parking, and blooming trees.
description_view_0: The long side of the building is visible, showing a row of evenly spaced windows, a central entrance, and green lawn bordered by two wide roads.
description_view_1: The short side of the building faces the viewer, with a row of parked cars, blooming trees, and the main entrance walkway leading up to the building.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is shown, featuring a continuous row of windows and a green lawn, with the parking area and trees partially visible.
description_view_3: The rear of the building is visible, showing a small fenced area, a garage, and a secondary entrance, with the main road in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced rows along both long sides of the building, with consistent alignment and grouping.
